race.comment: Very even with the majority struggling to find winning form. FACTUALLY (7) led and just missed fresh then was safely held over the sharper dash second-up. This more suitable and worth another chance off a much better draw, SWEET CITY DANCER (11) placed two back then was another below best last time. Well placed here and gets chance to find some form. CHOSEN VENTURE (1) is fitter for two runs back and has placed the course and distance. Ready to win and expected to go close. WHISKEY AND BEER (5) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing seventh at Echuca over 1412m. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. MISHIMA (4) is a major player with the claim and low draw.
